notes: The shipped agent answers Browser Rendering questions about overview, /crawl, /json, /scrape, and limits/constraints.
Use blprnt as the primary orchestrator after your own model/runtime setup; this bundle does not add a separate blprnt credential field.
Other runtimes can adapt these files manually, but no drop-in adapter is included or tested.
This config is for grounded retrieval/training workflows in blprnt, not model fine-tuning.
Reuse successful crawl artifacts before creating new jobs when limits or cost matter.
